title: Tu Shoolb
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Tu Shoolb |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |domain=[[Domain Shoolb]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|A change in speed might alert all those watching, for natural bodies would not so obviously accelerate.''»
«''Those watching? Do you doubt that Yomin Carr has performed?''»
«''No, Prefect. ''Belek tiu''.|Da'Gara and Tu Shoolb|translated=1|}} The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Tu Shoolb''' served the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] as an intendant of the [[Domain Shoolb]]. He assisted [[Prefect (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]] aboard the latter's [[Da'Gara's worldship|worldship]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship's]] voyage to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Helska IV]], he suggested not to accelerate in speed to Da'Gara, as an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]—which Gara's worldship was posing as—would not accelerate so "obviously." However, his prefect refused to comply in anticipation for his arrival. ==Biography== A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], Tu Shoolb was a member of his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Yuuzhan Vong empire|empire]] and its [[Domain Shoolb]] family, who assisted the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Vong invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|under]] [[Prefect (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]] aboard the prefect's [[Da'Gara's worldship|worldship]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' Gara ordered Shoolb to accelerate the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]], and the latter alerted the prefect that changing the worldship's speed could alert observers—[[ExGal-4|members]] of the [[Extragalactic Society]] organization focused on searching for extra–galactic life—as natural bodies would not accelerate so obviously, which would prompt them to study the ship. The prefect inquired his underling if he thought that the Vong agent [[Yomin Carr]] had not [[Death/Legends|killed]] them as he had been commanded to do, prompting an apology from Shoolb using the [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|''Belek tiu'']] Yuuzhan Vong phrase. The Domain Shoolb member then accelerated the worldship with its [[dovin basal]]s, which propelled it, under Gara's directive. Although he reconsidered his order, Gara did not belay it, as he was anxious to arrive at their destination, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Helska IV]]. ==Personality and traits== Tu Shoolb was considered cunning and resourceful by Prefect Gara. ==Behind the scenes== Tu Shoolb appeared in the [[1999]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]], the first volume in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' novel series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st|[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime (abridged audiobook)|audiobook]]}} *[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime'' abridged audiobook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tu Shoolb |es=Tu Shoolb |pl=Tu Shoolb }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Shoolb, Tu}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong intendants]]
